statement: In every magma, Equation 1194 (`x = y * ((z * (z * w)) * z)`) implies Equation 1583 (`x = (y * z) * (y * (w * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0031
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op z w)) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op y (op w z)))
